A. Every researcher passes the ethics review
B. If a researcher passes the ethics review, then the researcher shares the dataset

explanation: Option A follows from premises [3, 6, 7, 8] by forward chaining. The converse option reverses the implication; the negated option contradicts the derivable chain; the remaining option has no supporting premises. The answer is A.
